text: **NIP-60/61: you were right — nothing tracked the build-out.** What existed was NMP #1001, a stale p4 "decide the wallet milestone shape" queue issue. But `docs/architecture/nip60-nip61-wallet-design.md` (dated today) already *makes* every decision #1001 asked for, and the `nmp-nip60` crate plus Chirp's NWC-only `WalletView` already exist in code. So I created the tracking structure the design doc implies: [...] - **[NMP #2864](https://github.com/pablof7z/nostr-multi-platform/issues/2864)** — Epic: NIP-60/61 wallet milestone. Six phases straight from the design doc: reactivate `nmp-nip60` → `nmp-wallet` composition crate (WalletBackend seam + operation journal) → NWC consolidation behind the seam → NIP-60 Cashu wallet → NIP-61 nutzap send/receive → Chirp UX. Plus the doc's invariants (fail-closed, no secrets in projections, thin shells) and its full test-gate list. [...] - **[NMP #2865](https://github.com/pablof7z/nostr-multi-platform/issues/2865)** — Phase 0 subissue: bring `nmp-nip60` into workspace/CI, capability-gate the false `pay_invoice` stubs, demote the legacy `kind:17375` relay-tag authority.
